title: bidens reptans var. urbanii
intro: Bidens reptans var. urbanii, also known as Bidens, is a plant species belonging to the aster family that is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of triterpenoid saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and aiding in wound healing. Bidens reptans var. urbanii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
